thinking.text:
Now I understand the issue. The user says they got four friends to sign up, but only got bonuses for two. According to the policy:

- The weekly limit is up to 2 referral bonuses in any rolling 7-day window.
- If you attempt to receive more than 2 referrals in a single week, the third referral (and any subsequent referrals that week) will be automatically denied.

So the user likely had 2 referrals that completed within a 7-day window, and the other 2 were denied due to the weekly limit.

But before I can look up their specific referral status or account details, I need to first verify their identity. Let me ask for their information to start the process.

worker_attempts.visible_answer:
I'd be happy to help you look into your referral bonuses! Before I can access any account information, I'll need to verify your identity first.

Could you please provide me with your full name and any other details so I can look you up in our system?
